Hey team,


Attaching the latest metrics dashboard. Key highlights below:


Metric Feb 2026 Mar 2026 Δ
Monthly Active Users 1,247,832 1,391,205 +11.5%
Conversion Rate 3.2% 3.8% +0.6pp
Avg Session Duration 4m 12s 3m 48s -9.5%
Support Tickets 892 743 -16.7%


The session duration drop is worth investigating. Could be related to the navigation redesign we shipped on Feb 28.


Also, quick note on the Arabic localization:

مرحبا بكم في التطبيق الجديد

شكرا لاستخدامكم


Best,
M.


---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: A. Johnson <aj@example.com>
Date: Mon, Mar 2, 2026 at 3:15 PM
Subject: Re: Q1 planning
To: team@example.com

Thanks for compiling this. A few thoughts:

  • We should aim for 4.5% conversion by Q2 — the funnel optimization should get us there.
  • Session duration: let’s check if the new nav reduced unnecessary page views rather than engagement.
  • Support ticket drop is great — the new help center is paying off.

Can we schedule a 30-min review for Thursday? I’ll set up the calendar invite.


Cheers,
A.
